version_description: If you've never seen a man sing into a wrench, treat yourself to this song's music video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XBZUz4C6kqk.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]   x2

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
  I don't need, to fall at your feet[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
Just cause you cut me to the bone[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
  And I won't miss, the way that you kiss me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
We were never carved in stone[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]                          [ch]F[/ch]
  If I don't listen to the talk of the town[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
   Maybe I can fool myself[/tab]

[Chorus 1]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]
I'll get over you, I know I will[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]
I'll pretend my ship's not sinking[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]
And I'll tell myself, I'm over you[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C/E[/ch]               [ch]Dm7[/ch]
Cause I'm the King of wishful thinking[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
               I am the King of wishful thinking[/tab]

[tab][Horn Riff]
  [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]
e|--------------0-|
B|---------1--3---|
G|-0---2----------|
D|----------------|
A|----------------|
E|----------------|[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
  I refuse to give in to my blues[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
That's not how it's gonna be[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
  And I deny, the tears in my eyes[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
I don't want to let you see,   no![/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]                     [ch]F[/ch]
  That you have made a hole in my heart[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]                    [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
  And now I've got to fool myself[/tab]

[Chorus 2]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]
I'll get over you, I know I will[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]
I'll pretend my ship's not sinking[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]
And I'll tell myself, I'm over you[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]C/E[/ch]      [ch]Dm7[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]
Cause I'm the King of wishful thinking[/tab]
                            (I'll get over you)
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]
I know I will[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]
I'll pretend my ship's not sinking[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]
And I'll tell myself, I'm over you[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C/E[/ch]              [ch]Dm7[/ch]
Cause I'm the King of wishful thinking, yeah![/tab]

[Instrumental]
[ch]F[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                   [ch]Gsus[/ch]
I will never never shed a tear for you[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
I'll get over you, (I know I will)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]                          [ch]F[/ch]
  If I don't listen to the talk of the town[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
   Maybe I can fool myself[/tab]

[Chorus 3]
         N.C.
I'll get over you, I know I will
N.C.     
I'll pretend my ship's not sinking!
              N.C.
And I'll tell myself, I'm over you
[tab]               [ch]F[/ch]                [ch]Dm7[/ch]
Cause I'm the King of wishful thinking[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]                   [ch]Gsus[/ch]
I'm the King of wishful thinking[/tab]

[Chorus 4]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]
I'll get over you (I know I will)[/tab]
[tab] [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]
You made a hole in my heart[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]
  But I won't shed a tear for you[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C/E[/ch]              [ch]Dm7[/ch]
I'll be the King of wishful thinking[/tab]

[Chorus 5]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]
I'll get over you (I know I will)[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]
I'll pretend my heart's still beating[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]
Cause I've got no more tears for you[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C/E[/ch]              [ch]Dm7[/ch]
I'm the King of wishful thinking[/tab]

[Fade out]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]
I'll get over you, I know I will[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]
You made a hole in my heart[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]    
And I'll tell myself...[/tab]
